name: cosmosAccountName
description: The name of the Azure Cosmos DB resource that acts as the main backend storage for the Dashboard. (The deployment ads a suffix `-serverless` or `-provisioned` based on the Azure Cosmos DB pricing tier).

name: cosmosDatabaseName
description: The name of the singleton database in the Azure Cosmos DB resource that acts as the main backend storage for the Dashboard.

name: isProvisionedCosmos
description: Feature flag to control whether the Azure Cosmos DB resource should deploy as a provisioned or serverless resource. [How to choose between provisioned and serverless](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: resourcePrefix
description: An abbreviation to include in all the Azure resource names that Invictus deploys, often an environment name.

name: jwtSecretToken
description: The secret value of the Json Web Token (JWT) that the Dashboard users to facilitate authentication, stored as an Azure Key Vault secret.

name: containerAppsEnvironmentName
description: The name of the [Azure Container App environment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/environment).

name: invictusDashboardWebAppName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Dashboard web application.

name: appInsightsName
description: The name of the Azure Application Insights resource that tracks the general telemetry of the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: alertingAppInsightsName
description: The name of the Azure Application Insights resource that holds the alerts which the Dashboard stores for client-created flows.

name: serviceBusNamespaceName
description: The name of the Azure Service Bus resource that acts as the backend messaging system for sending asynchronous messages within the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: serviceBusSkuName
description: The pricing tier of the Azure Service Bus, used by the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: keyVaultName
description: The name of the shared Azure Key Vault, used by the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: storageAccountName
description: The name of the shared Azure Storage Account, used by Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: storageAccountType
description: The pricing tier of the shared Azure Storage Account, used by the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: eventHubNamespaceName
description: The name of the Azure Event Hubs namespace resource that acts as the backend event sink system for notifications within the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: eventHubName
description: The name of the Azure Event Hub within the namespace that receives diagnostic traces from client Azure Logic Apps with Consumption plan.

name: eventHubNameV2
description: The name of the Azure Event Hub within the namespace that receives diagnostic traces from client Azure Logic Apps with Standard plan.

name: eventHubSkuName
description: The pricing tier of the Azure Event Hubs namespace that acts as the backend event sink system for notifications within the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: eventHubSkuCapacity
description: The limit of the chosen pricing tier of the Azure Event Hubs namespace. [More on Azure Event Hubs quotas and limits](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/event-hubs/event-hubs-quotas).

name: eventHubAutoInflate
description: Indicates whether the Azure Event Hubs namespace should automatically scale up. [More on Azure Event Hubs throughput units](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/event-hubs/event-hubs-auto-inflate).

name: eventHubMaxThroughputUnits
description: The maximum amount of Azure Event Hubs throughput units for the namespace. [More on Azure Event Hubs throughput units](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/event-hubs/event-hubs-auto-inflate).

name: invictusImportJobFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the import job that [imports diagnostic traces from client Azure Logic Apps](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flows-via-la).

name: invictusCacheImportJobFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Dashboard backend infrastructure that handles internal caching during the importing of diagnostic traces of client resources.

name: invictusStoreImportJobFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Dashboard backend infrastructure that handles the final storage of flow traces within the Dashboard backend storage.

name: invictusFlowHandlerFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for handling flow operations requested by the Dashboard.

name: invictusGenericReceiverFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the import job that allows developers to [programmatically import diagnostic traces via an Azure Event Hub](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-prog-via-eh).

name: invictusDataFactoryReceiverFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the import job that [imports diagnostic traces from client Azure Data Factory pipelines](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-via-df).

name: invictusHttpReceiverFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the import job that allows developers to [programmatically import diagnostic traces via a HTTP endpoint](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-prog-via-http).

name: invictusFunctionAppImportJobFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the import job that [imports diagnostic traces from client Azure Function Apps](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-via-fa).

name: invictusDashboardGatewayFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the Dashboard Gateway that acts as the backend/back office of the web application.

name: invictusDatabaseManagerFunctionName
description: The name of the Azure Container App deployed for the store job that eventually stores the imported flow trace to the Dashboard backend storage.

name: workFlowEventHubName
description: The name of the Azure Event Hub where the cache job pushes pending flow traces, where merge job listens.

name: dataMergeWorkflowEventHubName
description: The name of the Azure Event Hub where the merge job pushes finalized flow traces, where the store job listens.

name: sideTasksWorkflowEventHubName
description: The name of the Azure Event Hub where the merge job determines Azure Logic App workflow action results to be packed with the flow traces.

name: dataFactoryEventHubName
description: The name of the Azure Event Hub for the [import job where Azure Data Factory pipeline diagnostic traces are send to](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-via-df).

name: genericEventHubName
description: The name of the Azure Event Hub for the [import job that programmatically imports flow traces via Azure Event Hubs](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-prog-via-eh).

name: caeVnetInfraRgName
description: The name of the Azure Container Apps infrastructure resource group ([when VNET is enabled](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/custom-virtual-networks?tabs=workload-profiles-env)).

name: devOpsObjectId
description: The object ID associated with the service principal of the enterprise application that the Azure DevOps service connection is created for.

name: enableVnetSupport
description: Feature flag to control whether the Dashboard deploys within a VNET.

name: vnetName
description: The name of the Azure Virtual Network (VNET) resource that forms the base for all network-related rules and subnets throughout.

name: serviceBusSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Service Bus namespace resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: eventHubSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Event Hubs namespace resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: storageAccountSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Storage Account resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: keyVaultSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Key Vault resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: cosmosDbSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB resource, useful for VNET deployments.

name: containerAppEnvironmentSubnets
description: A list of subnet names to form the network rules of all the Azure Container App resources, useful for VNET deployments.

name: containerAppEnvironmentSubnetName
description: The name of the subnet to form the network rules of the Azure Container App environment, useful for VNET deployments.

name: containerRegistryUrl
description: The server URL of the Azure Container Apps registry that hosts the Dashboard's container images.

name: azureActiveDirectoryClientId
description: The application ID of the Microsoft Entra ID app registration that facilitates authentication towards the client's Microsoft Entra ID resource, useful when the Dashboard is configured for Microsoft Entra ID signin authentication.

name: azureActiveDirectoryTenantId
description: The tenant ID of the Microsoft Entra ID app registration that facilitates authentication towards the client's Microsoft Entra ID resource, useful when the Dashboard is configured for Microsoft Entra ID signin authentication.

name: azureActiveDirectoryClientSecret
description: The client secret of the Microsoft Entra ID app registration that facilitates authentication towards the client's Microsoft Entra ID resource, useful when the Dashboard is configured for Microsoft Entra ID signin authentication.

name: azureActiveDirectoryAudience
description: The allowed audience when the Dashboard interacts with the client's the Microsoft Entra ID during managing Azure Logic Apps alerts.

name: appInsightsSamplingPercentage
description: The sampling percentage for the Azure Application Insights that tracks the general telemetry of the Dashboard.

name: messageStatusCacheDeleteAfterDays
description: The time period (in days) after which the storage policy deletes the message status Azure Storage Account table.

name: customTags
description: A set of Azure resource tags to apply to all to the deployed Invictus resources.

name: isAdDisabled
description: Feature flag to control whether the Dashboard should use Microsoft Entra ID besides local authentication for signing in users into the Dashboard.

name: maxHttpHeaderSizeInBytes
description: The maximum allowed size (in bytes) of a HTTP header during interaction between the Dashboard web application and the Dashboard backend/back office.

name: keyVaultEnablePurgeProtection
description: Indicates whether the shared Azure Key Vault should be protected against purging.

name: logAnalyticsworkspaceNamelaV2
description: The name of the Azure Log Analytics workspace besides the main workspace that collects the main telemetry of the Azure Application Insights resource.

name: logAnalyticsWorkspaceAppInsightsName
description: The name of the Azure Log Analytics workspace that acts as the main workspace that collects the main telemetry of the Azure Application Insights resource.

name: containerAppsEnvironmentLocation
description: The Azure location for the Azure Container Apps and their environment.

name: disableStorageAccountPublicNetworkAccess
description: Indicates whether the shared Azure Storage Account should disable public network access. If `true`, only private endpoints or VNET integration are allowed.

name: storageAccountMinimumTLSVersion
description: The minimum allowed TLS version of the shared Azure Storage Account, used by the Dashboard backend infrastructure.

name: invictusDashboardWebAppLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Dashboard web application.

name: invictusCacheImportJobFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the cache job.

name: invictusStoreImportJobFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the merge job.

name: invictusFlowHandlerFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Flow Handler.

name: invictusGenericReceiverFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the [import job that programmatically imports diagnostic traces via Azure Event Hubs](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-prog-via-eh).

name: invictusDataFactoryReceiverFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the [import job that imports diagnostic traces from Azure Data Factory pipelines](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-via-df).

name: invictusHttpReceiverFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the [import job that programmatically imports diagnostic traces via a HTTP endpoint](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-prog-via-http).

name: invictusDashboardGatewayFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the Dashboard Gateway that acts as the backend/back office of the web application.

name: invictusDatabaseManagerFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the store job.

name: invictusImportJobFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the [import job that imports diagnostic traces from Azure Logic Apps](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flows-via-la).

name: invictusFunctionAppImportJobFunctionLocalContainerImage
description: The URL that navigates to the Azure Container App image of the [import job that imports diagnostic traces from Azure Function Apps](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-via-fa).

name: flowDataCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the flow traces MongoDB collection in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: workflowEventsCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the MongoDB collection for Azure Logic Apps workflows (mentioned in a flow trace) in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: messageContentCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the MongoDB collection for the Azure Logic Apps workflow actions (mentioned in a flow trace) in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: auditsCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the audits MongoDB collection in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: dashboardSettingsCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the Dashboard settings MongoDB collection in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: folderFlowsCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the flow folders MongoDB collection in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: groupsCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the Microsoft Entra ID group references MongoDB collection in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: statisticsCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the flow trace reports MongoDB collection in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: usersCollectionThroughput
description: The [collection throughput (RU/s)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/set-throughput) for the local and Microsoft Entra ID user references MongoDB collection in the Azure Cosmos DB resource, used when the [Azure Cosmos DB deploys as provisioned](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cosmos-db/throughput-serverless).

name: eventHubMessageRetentionInDays
description: The amount of days Azure Event Hubs messages will be retained on all the hubs throughout [More on Microsoft documentation on Azure Event Hubs properties](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/event-hubs/configure-event-hub-properties).

name: identityProviderClientSecret
description: The client secret of the Microsoft Entra ID app registration that facilitates managed identity authentication for the Azure Container Apps, hosting the Dashboard.

name: allowStorageAccountSharedKeyAccess
description: Indicates whether the shared Azure Storage Account allows authentication via a shared key access.

name: containerRegistryName
description: The name of the Azure Container Apps registry that hosts the Dashboard's container images.

name: acaIdentityName
description: The name of the user-assigned identity that pulls the container images from the Azure Container Registry.

name: logicAppsImportJobErrorFilters
description:
A list of Azure Logic Apps workflow error codes (ex. 'ActionConditionFailed', 'ActionFailed'...) that the [import job importing diagnostic traces from Azure Logic App workflows](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flows-via-la) should use to filter in specific diagnostic traces. 
 * Use `*` to include all error codes. 
 * Use `<error-code>` for a single code. 
 * Use  `<error-code>, <error-code>` for more than one code.

name: logAnalyticsWorkspaceImportFunctionV2Cron
description: The time period in which the automatically Azure Functions timer trigger [imports Azure Logic Apps diagnostic traces](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flows-via-la).
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, support for automatically triggering importing stops.

name: logAnalyticsWorkspaceMaxNoOfRows
description: The maximum amount of rows to query the Azure Log Analytics workspace to automatically [import Azure Logic Apps diagnostic traces](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flows-via-la).
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, support for automatically triggering importing stops.

name: flowActivityIntervalInMinutes
description: The time period threshold (in minutes) to update the active flow traces watermark during finalizing pending flow traces in the merge job.
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, support for custom event tracking for flow activity stops.

name: storeImportJobBatchSize
description: The maximum amount of events included in a single batch for the store job. [More on Azure Event Hubs processor properties](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-functions/functions-bindings-event-hubs?tabs=isolated-process%2Cextensionv5&pivots=programming-language-csharp)

name: storeImportJobPreFetchCount
description: The number of events eagerly requested from Azure Event Hubs by the store job. [More on Azure Event Hubs processor properties](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-functions/functions-bindings-event-hubs?tabs=isolated-process%2Cextensionv5&pivots=programming-language-csharp)

name: statisticsCutOffDays
description: The number of days (in negative numbers) to go back from the current day, used when setting up a custom flow trace report based on active flows in the Dashboard.

name: flowBlobArchiverFunctionCron
description: The CRON expression that represents the time period in which flow trace information is archived.
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, clearing happens via Cosmos DB for MongoDB TTL policies.

name: hashCacheClearFunctionCron
description: The CRON expression that represents the time period in which to clear the Dashboard storage backend cache.
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, clearing happens via Azure Storage Account policies.

name: workFlowEventsClearFunctionCron
description: The CRON expression that represents the time period in which to clear the Azure Logic Apps workflow Dashboard backend storage.
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, clearing happens via Cosmos DB for MongoDB TTL policies.

name: azureWebJobsWorkFlowEventsClearFunctionDisabled
description: Indicates whether the Azure Functions timer trigger should be disabled, meaning the Azure Logic Apps workflow Dashboard backend storage won't be cleared.
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, clearing happens via Cosmos DB for MongoDB TTL policies.

name: maxMessageStatusCacheInDay
description: The maximum amount of messages per day cached during importing.
deprecated: Will be removed in v7, caching happens independently now.

name: identityProviderApplicationId
description: The application ID of the Microsoft Entra ID app registration that facilitates managed identity authentication for the Azure Container Apps, hosting the Dashboard.

name: customApplicationIds
description: A list of additional IDs referring to custom Microsoft Entra ID applications that should also be able to access the Azure Container Apps hosting the Dashboard.

name: flowDataTTLInDays
description: The maximum amount of days the flow traces stay remain in the Dashboard backend storage.

name: performSqlDataMigration
description: Indicates whether the old SQL data storage migrates to the new Azure Cosmos DB for MongoDB storage (< v6 installations).

name: dashboardScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options for the Dashboard web application.

properties.name: cpuResources
properties.description: The amount of CPU resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: memoryResources
properties.description: The amount of memory resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: scaleMinReplicas
properties.description: The lowest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale in to.

properties.name: scaleMaxReplicas
properties.description: The highest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale out to.

properties.name: concurrentRequests
properties.description: When the number of HTTP requests exceeds this value, then another replica is added. Replicas continue to add to the pool up to the maxReplicas amount. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/scale-app?pivots=container-apps-bicep) for the allowed values.

name: dashboardGatewayScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options for the Dashboard Gateway backend/back office.

properties.name: cpuResources
properties.description: The amount of CPU resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: memoryResources
properties.description: The amount of memory resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: scaleMinReplicas
properties.description: The lowest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale in to.

properties.name: scaleMaxReplicas
properties.description: The highest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale out to.

properties.name: concurrentRequests
properties.description: When the number of HTTP requests exceeds this value, then another replica is added. Replicas continue to add to the pool up to the maxReplicas amount. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/scale-app?pivots=container-apps-bicep) for the allowed values.

name: cacheImportJobScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options for the cache job.

properties.name: cpuResources
properties.description: The amount of CPU resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: memoryResources
properties.description: The amount of memory resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: scaleMinReplicas
properties.description: The lowest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale in to.

properties.name: scaleMaxReplicas
properties.description: The highest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale out to.

properties.name: messageCount
properties.description: The amount of active messages in your Azure Service Bus queue or topic to scale on. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/scale-app?pivots=container-apps-bicep) for the allowed values.

name: dbImportJobScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options for the merge job.

properties.name: cpuResources
properties.description: The amount of CPU resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: memoryResources
properties.description: The amount of memory resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.name: scaleMinReplicas
properties.description: The lowest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale in to.

properties.name: scaleMaxReplicas
properties.description: The highest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale out to.

properties.name: unprocessedEventThreshold
properties.description: The average target value to trigger scaling actions. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/scale-app?pivots=container-apps-bicep) for the allowed values.

name: datafactoryReceiverScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options for the [import job that imports diagnostic traces from Azure Data Factory pipelines](/dashboard/flows/import-flow-traces/import-flow-via-df).

name: storeImportJobScaling
description: The Azure Container App scaling options for the store job.

properties.name: cpuResources
properties.description: The amount of CPU resources to dedicate for the Azure Container App. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/containers#allocations) for the allowed values.

properties.description: The highest number of replicas the Azure Container App will scale out to.

properties.name: unprocessedEventThreshold
properties.description: The average target value to trigger scaling actions. See [Microsoft's documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-apps/scale-app?pivots=container-apps-bicep) for the allowed values.

name: dnsZoneSubscriptionId
description: The Azure subscription ID to control the private DNS zone throughout, useful for VNET deployments.

name: dnsZoneResourceGroupName
description: The name of the Azure resource group where the private DNS zone deploys to.

name: vnetResourceGroupName
description: The name of the Azure resource group where the VNET network rules deploys to.

name: useResourceLocks
description: Feature flag to control whether the deployed Azure resources have [resource locks](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-resource-manager/management/lock-resources).

name: invictusUserManagedIdentityName
description: The name of the Azure user managed identity that has access to all the deployed Azure Container App components.

name: dashboard
description: The options to configure the Dashboard web application.

properties.name: applicationGateway
properties.description: The options to configure the load balancer, application gateway. [More on Azure Application Gateway on Microsoft's documentation site.](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/application-gateway/overview).

properties.name: customGatewayUrl
properties.description: Overrides the URL where the  Dashboard Gateway backend  is hosted.

properties.name: customCallbackUrl
properties.description: Overrides the callback URL where the Dashboard frontend web application should redirect itself to.
